genius.name: Very Intelligent
genius.description: You have extraordinary logical abilities. Analytical mindset and problem-solving are very sharp.

average.name: Good Enough
average.description: Your logical abilities are above average. You can understand patterns well and solve problems.

beginner.name: Just Starting
beginner.description: You are still honing your logical skills. Don't be discouraged – everyone has their own uniqueness.
weaknesses: Need a lot of logic practice
